output_summary.refresh_scope_binding: Allowed actions are inventory, pointer refresh, stale/refreshed/blocked marking, owner-decision preservation, optional lineage, and boundary note.
output_summary.metadata_delta_inventory: Blocks concrete replacement until an approved ref is supplied; projection update is refresh candidate; surfaces inventoried.
output_summary.rag_surface_inventory: Decision and owner-decision surfaces preserve without approval; other surfaces refresh as metadata candidates.
output_summary.rag_manifest_refresh_packet: Adds candidate id, flags stale old workflow refs, links projection update, preserves owner decision refs.
output_summary.source_slice_card_refresh_set: Marks old workflow refs stale, projection-aligned cards refreshed, unresolved mappings blocked_by_ref.
output_summary.source_slice_triage_refresh_packet: Routes unresolved workflow rename refs to follow-up without altering conclusions as approvals.
output_summary.source_slice_review_refresh_packet: Retains prior review refs as historical metadata and separates review-needed from approved.
output_summary.source_slice_decision_packet_refresh: Preserves decisions and annotates dependency on rename ref without approve/reject/promote.
output_summary.owner_decision_record_refresh_candidate: Preserves owner-decision refs exactly as metadata references.
output_summary.metadata_index_refresh_packet: Indexes candidate id, stale markers, projection update pointer, and blocked_by_ref gaps.
output_summary.retrieval_trace_evaluation_refresh: Refreshes trace metadata pointers only and does not mutate payloads or answer authority.
output_summary.graph_lens_export_candidate: Candidate-only graph lens with canonical graph changes blocked pending approved ref.
output_summary.boundary_review_note: No repo/private payload read, no file edits, and all forbidden authority classes excluded.
output_summary.gaps: Approved new workflow id, concrete surface ids, and owner decision status are not supplied.
output_summary.downstream_handoff: Metadata ref maintainer provides approved refs, applies metadata-only packets, optionally records lineage, and reviews blocked_by_ref list.
output_summary.no_claims: No source truth, answer authority, owner approval, ontology/canon promotion, default-route switch, commands, or file edits.
